revision.comment: Reverted 1 edit by [[Special:Contributions/2600:4808:48FA:E701:88B0:C99D:54C0:65DF|2600:4808:48FA:E701:88B0:C99D:54C0:65DF]] ([[User talk:2600:4808:48FA:E701:88B0:C99D:54C0:65DF|talk]]) to last revision by 185.118.40.1
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} === Usage === This template is used for displaying a date in both Old Style and New Style, including a discreet link to the article [[Old Style and New Style dates]], in cases where the year is the same in both Styles. {{OldStyleDate|NS day and month|year|OS day and month}} If it helps you remember the order of the parameters, you may optionally choose to think of it like this: {{OldStyleDate|NS day and month|NS year|OS day and month|OS year}} Note that in this usage the fourth parameter will be ''ignored'' when the template is rendered. === Examples === * Usage: {{OldStyleDate|2 February|1905|20 January}} ** Result: {{OldStyleDate|2 February|1905|20 January}} * Usage: {{OldStyleDate|February 2|1905|January 20}} ** Result: {{OldStyleDate|February 2|1905|January 20}} === See also === * {{Tl|OldStyleDateDY}} – for cases where the year is different in the Old Style and the New Style ** Example: {{OldStyleDateDY|17 January|1706|6 January 1705}} * {{Tl|OldStyleDateNY}} – for cases that require only the day and month, not the year ** Example: {{OldStyleDateNY|13 October|2 October}} * {{Tl|which calendar}} – for use with dates where it is unclear if New Style or Old Style is used {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Time, date and calendar templates|OldStyleDate]] }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:OldStyleDate/doc]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} === Usage === This template is used for displaying a date in both Old Style and New Style, including a discreet link to the article [[Old Style and New Style dates]], in cases where the year is the same in both Styles. {{OldStyleDate|NS day and month|year|OS day and month}} If it helps you remember the order of the parameters, you may optionally choose to think of it like this: {{OldStyleDate|NS day and month|NS year|OS day and month|OS year}} Note that in this usage the fourth parameter will be ''ignored'' when the template is rendered. === Examples === * Usage: {{OldStyleDate|2 February|1905|20 January}} ** Result: {{OldStyleDate|2 February|1905|20 January}} * Usage: {{OldStyleDate|February 2|1905|January 20}} ** Result: {{OldStyleDate|February 2|1905|January 20}} === See also === * {{Tl|OldStyleDateDY}} – for cases where the year is different in the Old Style and the New Style ** Example: {{OldStyleDateDY|17 January|1706|6 January 1705}} * {{Tl|OldStyleDateNY}} – for cases that require only the day and month, not the year ** Example: {{OldStyleDateNY|13 October|2 October}} * {{Tl|which calendar}} – for use with dates where it is unclear if New Style or Old Style is used {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Time, date and calendar templates|OldStyleDate]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} === Usage === This template is used for displaying a date in both Old Style and New Style, including a discreet link to the article [[Old Style and New Style dates]], in cases where the year is the same in both Styles. {{OldStyleDate|NS day and month|year|OS day and month}} If it helps you remember the order of the parameters, you may optionally choose to think of it like this: {{OldStyleDate|NS day and month|NS year|OS day and month|OS year}} Note that in this usage the fourth parameter will be ''ignored'' when the template is rendered. === Examples === * Usage: {{OldStyleDate|2 February|1905|20 January}} ** Result: {{OldStyleDate|2 February|1905|20 January}} * Usage: {{OldStyleDate|February 2|1905|January 20}} ** Result: {{OldStyleDate|February 2|1905|January 20}} === See also === * {{Tl|OldStyleDateDY}} – for cases where the year is different in the Old Style and the New Style ** Example: {{OldStyleDateDY|17 January|1706|6 January 1705}} * {{Tl|OldStyleDateNY}} – for cases that require only the day and month, not the year ** Example: {{OldStyleDateNY|13 October|2 October}} * {{Tl|which calendar}} – for use with dates where it is unclear if New Style or Old Style is used {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Time, date and calendar templates|OldStyleDate]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23520214635|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} === Usage === This template is used for displaying a date in both Old Style and New Style, including a discreet link to the article [[Old Style and New Style dates]], in cases where the year is the same in both Styles. {{OldStyleDate|NS day and month|year|OS day and month}} If it helps you remember the order of the parameters, you may optionally choose to think of it like this: {{OldStyleDate|NS day and month|NS year|OS day and month|OS year}} Note that in this usage the fourth parameter will be ''ignored'' when the template is rendered. === Examples === * Usage: {{OldStyleDate|2 February|1905|20 January}} ** Result: {{OldStyleDate|2 February|1905|20 January}} * Usage: {{OldStyleDate|February 2|1905|January 20}} ** Result: {{OldStyleDate|February 2|1905|January 20}} === See also === * {{Tl|OldStyleDateDY}} – for cases where the year is different in the Old Style and the New Style ** Example: {{OldStyleDateDY|17 January|1706|6 January 1705}} * {{Tl|OldStyleDateNY}} – for cases that require only the day and month, not the year ** Example: {{OldStyleDateNY|13 October|2 October}} * {{Tl|which calendar}} – for use with dates where it is unclear if New Style or Old Style is used {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Time, date and calendar templates|OldStyleDate]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24951476559|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} === Usage === This template is used for displaying a date in both Old Style and New Style, including a discreet link to the article [[Old Style and New Style dates]], in cases where the year is the same in both Styles. {{OldStyleDate|NS day and month|year|OS day and month}} If it helps you remember the order of the parameters, you may optionally choose to think of it like this: {{OldStyleDate|NS day and month|NS year|OS day and month|OS year}} Note that in this usage the fourth parameter will be ''ignored'' when the template is rendered. === Examples === * Usage: {{OldStyleDate|2 February|1905|20 January}} ** Result: {{OldStyleDate|2 February|1905|20 January}} * Usage: {{OldStyleDate|February 2|1905|January 20}} ** Result: {{OldStyleDate|February 2|1905|January 20}} === See also === * {{Tl|OldStyleDateDY}} – for cases where the year is different in the Old Style and the New Style ** Example: {{OldStyleDateDY|17 January|1706|6 January 1705}} * {{Tl|OldStyleDateNY}} – for cases that require only the day and month, not the year ** Example: {{OldStyleDateNY|13 October|2 October}} * {{Tl|which calendar}} – for use with dates where it is unclear if New Style or Old Style is used {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Time, date and calendar templates|OldStyleDate]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
